name: openEuler sig-AccLib SIG
description: The AccLib team is responsible for exploring high-performance acceleration technologies and solutions such as accelerator hardware engines and acceleration instructions.

name: openEuler sig-AccLib SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-AccLib SIG maintains 25 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-AccLib SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The AccLib team is responsible for exploring high-performance acceleration technologies and solutions such as accelerator hardware engines and acceleration instructions.. The SIG has 10 core members and maintains 25 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-AccLib SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-AccLib SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at acc@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-AccLib SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-AccLib SIG maintains 25 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-AccLib.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-AccLib SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-AccLib SIG has 4 Maintainers, including: fanghao, Zhangfei Gao, wujunhao. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
